creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Tue May 20 02:50:20 2014
New Revision: 354589
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/354589
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r354589/

Log:
  - Update to 0.9.6 release

  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/x11-fm/doublecmd/Makefile
  head/x11-fm/doublecmd/distinfo

Modified: head/x11-fm/doublecmd/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-fm/doublecmd/Makefile	Tue May 20 00:43:07 2014	(r354588)
+++ head/x11-fm/doublecmd/Makefile	Tue May 20 02:50:20 2014	(r354589)
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	doublecmd
-PORTVERSION=	0.5.9
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.5.10
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fm
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}/Double%20Commander%20Source
@@ -30,7 +29,7 @@ WANT_GNOME=	yes
 PLIST=		${WRKDIR}/pkg-plist
 
 PROJECT_FILE=	src/doublecmd.lpi
-LAZBUILD_CMD=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/lazbuild -d
+LAZBUILD_CMD=	${LOCALBASE}/bin/lazbuild -d --pcp=${WRKSRC}/tmppcp
 LAZARUS_DIR=	${LOCALBASE}/share/lazarus
 
 HELPVERSION=	0.5.5
